---
title: "Past Works"
---

A selection of past analyses and research work.

- **[HFRS Incubation Period Estimation](Hantavirus.html)** — Bayesian
  (Stan/HMC) and MLE estimation of the incubation period for hemorrhagic
  fever with renal syndrome, using a doubly interval-censored likelihood.

- **[Internship at TWCR](Internship.html)** — Data visualization work
  from an internship at the Taiwan Cancer Registry, including a
  county-by-cancer-site incidence ranking heatmap.

- **[Bongkrekic Acid Food Poisoning (2024)](Bongkrekic_Acid_2024.html)**
  — Early-stage outbreak forecasting with GMITS (Grey Model for
  Irregular Time Series), validated on synthetic data and applied to a
  real point-source outbreak. This the main intention of researching limited data prediction.

- **[2011 Listeria Outbreak](Listeria_2011.html)** — GMITS applied to a
  sporadic foodborne outbreak, comparing forecast accuracy across
  input sizes (n = 4/5/6) and testing sensitivity to right-truncated
  (underreported) recent data.
